title: sutera mollis
intro: Sutera mollis, also known as Jersey tea or sweet goldenrod, is a flowering plant that belongs to the madder family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a substitute for black tea due to its caffeine-free and soothing effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and aiding in digestion. Sutera mollis is commonly prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, which can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
